recommendations.title: The Measure of a Man
recommendations.overview: At the age of 51 and after 20 months on unemployment, Thierry starts a new job that soon brings him face to face with a moral dilemma. How much is he willing to accept to keep his job?

recommendations.title: Another World

recommendations.title: Out of Season

recommendations.title: The Shop Around the Corner
recommendations.overview: Two employees at a gift shop can barely stand one another, without realising that they are falling in love through the post as each other's anonymous pen pal.

recommendations.title: 7 Minutes
recommendations.overview: Women in a failing silk factory, fight to find a way to keep their jobs.

recommendations.title: OMG: Oh My God!
recommendations.overview: A shopkeeper takes God to court when his shop is destroyed by an earthquake.

recommendations.title: Shelter

recommendations.title: Kiss and Cry
recommendations.overview: A romantic drama based on the story of Carley Allison, a promising 18 year old figure skater and singer who made medical history in her fight against a rare 1 in 3.5 billion type of sarcoma.

recommendations.title: Girl
recommendations.overview: A promising teenage dancer enrolls at a prestigious ballet school while grappling with her gender dysphoria.
